Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}What a wacky store, huh? Somethin' about, "Cleanse your soul and face your inner self"?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}Not sure what that's all about, but... Maybe this place could do some good for us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2118 0 0}...I'll give it a shot, I guess. Wonder what my "inner self" is like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}Oh, this place again. You know they say they'll help you "cleanse your soul and face your inner self" or whatever? Weird, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}Actually, he took me here before. Didn't take long for me to conk out and snooze through the whole thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2118 0 0}But this time'll be different![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2105 0 0}This place again? Hehe, you really like comin' here, don't you, Ai-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Well, y'know... I don't mind it that much either. Anyway, here goes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2017 0 0}Man, I slept like a log! I seriously don't remember anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}To be honest with ya... I feel like a weight's been lifted off my shoulders, so much so I might even burst into tears—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2063 0 0}I mean, uh... Who said that? Not me! Just forget you heard anything![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Well, anyway, thanks for the invite![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2017 0 0}...I can't believe it. I just slept through the whole thing again. What even happened after we went in? I'm drawing a blank.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Haha, the exact same thing happened when I went with him. Heck, I feel just as relaxed as I did then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}I'm glad I got the chance to come here again. Thanks for inviting me, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2017 0 0}Man... I was completely out cold the whole time. I can't remember a single thing that went down in there—again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}But, I hafta admit, I dunno what they did in there, but I feel good. Real good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2043 0 0}Thanks for the invite. Now I'm ready to rock 'n' roll![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost nighttime... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
